arts.ttl: Who is Chelsea-linked Mathis Amougou? The highly-rated French star who could secure deadline day move
arts.sum: The Blues could make a deadline day move for him...

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree first deadline day transfer after Enzo Maresca warning and Enzo Fernandez chat
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca looks set to be without Aaron Anselmino when Chelsea face West Ham. The Blues will host the Hammers at Stamford Bridge on Monday night, just hours before the January transfer window slams shut . Upon Anselmino's move to Chelsea, Juan Roman Riquelme backed him to become a 'great footballer' and a senior international for Argentina.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to make late move for Alejandro Garnacho as Man Utd eye Christopher Nkunku swap deal
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to make a final late move to sign Alejandro Garnacho from Manchester United on transfer deadline day, football.london understands. And football.london understands that Nkunku's situation could hold the key to any deal being done.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Premier League rival 'end interest' in Axel Disasi
arts.sum: One of Axel Disasi's suitors in the Premier League reportedly make the decision to end their interest in signing the Chelsea defender.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter could help Leeds land goalscorer in last minutes of transfer window
arts.sum: It’s looking like being a busy transfer deadline day for Leeds, though it’s West Ham manager Graham Potter that could play a big role in whether Daniel Farke lands a striker. The all whites sit proudly atop the Championship table and a 7-0 win over Cardiff City at the weekend puts them as the top […] The post Graham Potter could help Leeds land goalscorer in last minutes of transfer window appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: The Transfermarkt deadline day live blog: Chelsea midfielder heading to Dortmund?
arts.sum: Hello and welcome to the Transfermarkt deadline day live blog for the final day of the January 2025 transfer window. The past few weeks have had plenty of twists and turns but as we approach the...

arts.ttl: Nkunku swap, Garnacho signs and Felix sold - Chelsea dream squad after transfer deadline day - Tom Coley - football.london
arts.sum: Taking into account the rules of having no more than 17 non-homegrown players in a Premier League squad, in which those in their Under-21 season or younger do not count towards the total, football.london has taken a look at what might be on the cards. It initially looked like the backline would be the area for most movement with Marc Guehi remaining a target and Chalobah returning.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho makes feelings clear as Man Utd transfer officially confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United are running out of time to take care of their final bits of business in the winter transfer window after leaving things late over the summer as well

arts.ttl: Chelsea make Nkunku decision as Maresca receives NIGHTMARE transfer news
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Tottenham Hotspur have ended their interest in Chelsea defender Axel Disasi, despite reaching an agreement to sign the 26-year-old. Christopher Nkunku is now expected to stay at Chelsea for the remainder of the season, despite reported interest from Bayern Munich and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Will Blues submit improved bid for Man City's Nico O'Reilly on deadline day?
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly rebuff an approach from Chelsea for midfielder Nico O'Reilly, but will the West Londoners return with an fresh offer?
